title: FOOGO Green 150pcs Small 12cm, Bamboo Skewers, FSC® Certified, Sturdy Eco-Friendly Wooden, Barbecue, BBQ & Kebabs Skewers, Fruit Picks, Cocktail Sticks, for Camping, Parties and Wedding
features: PREMIUM QUALITY and STURDY - Made from high quality naturally grown bamboo, our skewers are extremely sturdy. They are perfect for barbecues, grills, kebabs and for holding tall layers of burgers and sandwiches together.
POINTED tips and SMOOTH polished surface (no splinters) to ensure the skewers can slide easily through meat, fruits and vegetables.

The flat PADDLE shape makes it easy to hold fully loaded skewers or turn them in barbecues and grills. **NOTE – The length of the skewers includes the handles; please check the images for the total usable length.

A GREENER alternative - Our bamboo skewers are an eco-friendly alternative to plastic or metal skewers that can harm the environment. They are also a great alternative to wooden skewers that come from trees.

ECO-FRIENDLY and SUSTAINABLE – Bamboo is a miracle plant that grows rapidly and does not require any fertilisers and pesticides. With our earth conscious ZERO PLASTIC packaging, this is as eco-friendly and sustainable as it can get.
COMPOSTABLE and BIODEGRADABLE - When you're done with them, simply dispose of our bamboo skewers in your compost bin or with your other organic waste.

One-stop-shop for ECO PARTY SUPPLIES - Our range of products includes disposable palm leaf plates, disposable wooden cutlery sets, eco-friendly napkins, biodegradable straws, disposable bowls, serving trays and more.

A greener alternative. Old challenge. New solution. We believe convenience should never come at the expense of our planet. Decades of misusing our planet’s resources have taken a toll on the environment, and this is our solution. These premium skewers are made from carefully sourced bamboo - a fast-growing, highly renewable resource. Be good. Do good. We are FSC certified . This is our commitment to ensuring healthy, resilient forests for all. We are Carbon Neutral . We offset all carbon emissions right from manufacturing, all the way to delivery to customers. Gift from nature. Designed for convenience. FOOGO Green bamboo skewers are thoughtfully designed for convenience. The flat ends provide a secure grip, making it easy to turn the skewers even when fully loaded with food. All occasions. FOOGO Green bamboo skewers are versatile for grilling, appetisers, fruits, or marshmallows. Durable, splinter-free, with sharp tips for every use, they're perfect for indoor and outdoor cooking or entertaining. More from FOOGO Green....
